title: IFC, private nonguaranteed (NFL, US$)

currency_display.note: Real variant computed by this project (not WDI-native) using each country's own FX rate + CPI, base year 2015. Iran: parallel/black-market rate for 1979-present. Venezuela/Argentina: parallel/black-market rate for their own documented official-vs-parallel divergence eras. All other countries: WDI official PA.NUS.FCRF (no known equivalent divergence). See docs/bookkeeping.md and data/processed/fx_cpi_lookup_<iso3>.json.

title_fa: شرکت مالی بین‌المللی (IFC)، بخش خصوصی بدون تضمین دولتی (NFL، دلار آمریکا)
